mapper.select:
SELECT ai.id, ai.title, ai.cover_path AS coverUrl, ai.duration, ai.creator_id AS creatorId, ai.create_time AS submitTime, u.nickname AS creatorName, t.full_text AS transcript FROM audio_info ai LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ai.creator_id = u.id LEFT JOIN audio_transcript t ON ai.id = t.audio_id WHERE ai.is_deleted = 0
AND ai.audit_status = 0
AND ai.audit_status = 1
AND ai.audit_status = 2
ORDER BY ai.create_time DESC
